text:
Sunstar (サンスター, Sansutā) is a personal health and beauty company that held a collaboration with the Hunter × Hunter series.

Information

The first collaboration ran from October 16th, 2022, to January 15th, 2023. The campaign title was, "Aim To Be A Oral Care Triple-Star Hunter!" (目指せ、口腔ケアの!, Mezase, Kōkō Kea no Toripuru Hantā!).

Collaboration Characters

Gon Freecss
Killua Zoldyck
Kurapika
Leorio Paradinight
Hisoka Morow
